blocks.css: .crm-wrap{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 20px}.crm-head h2{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:1.7rem}.crm-head p{margin:0 0 28px;opacity:.7}.crm-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 320px;gap:24px;align-items:start}@media(max-width:780px){.crm-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.crm-tablecard{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);overflow:hidden}.crm-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:.94rem}.crm-table th,.crm-table td{text-align:left;padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)}.crm-table th{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.6;font-weight:600}.crm-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:0}.crm-empty{text-align:center;opacity:.6;padding:28px 16px}.crm-badge{display:inline-block;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px;font-size:.74rem;font-weight:600;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18)}.crm-badge.won{color:#34d399;border-color:rgba(52,211,153,.4)}.crm-badge.lost{color:#fb7185;border-color:rgba(251,113,133,.4)}.crm-badge.new{color:#38bdf8;border-color:rgba(56,189,248,.4)}.crm-form{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);padding:24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}.crm-form h3{margin:0 0 4px;font-size:1.1rem}.crm-form label{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;opacity:.9}.crm-form input,.crm-form select{padding:11px 13px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);color:inherit;font-size:.95rem}.crm-form button{margin-top:4px;padding:13px 18px;border:0;border-radius:10px;font-weight:600;font-size:.95rem;cursor:pointer;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1,#22d3ee);color:#06070d}.crm-form button:disabled{opacity:.6;cursor:default}.crm-msg{margin:2px 0 0;min-height:1.1em;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:600}.crm-msg.ok{color:#34d399}.crm-msg.err{color:#fb7185}
blocks.js: (function(){var SAMPLE=[{name:'Maya Chen',company:'Northwind',email:'maya@northwind.com',status:'Qualified'},{name:'Tom Alvarez',company:'Globex',email:'tom@globex.io',status:'Proposal'},{name:'Priya Rao',company:'Initech',email:'priya@initech.com',status:'New'}];var rows=document.getElementById('crm-rows');function esc(s){return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"',"'":'''}[c];});}function badge(s){var k=String(s||'').toLowerCase();var cls=k==='won'?'won':k==='lost'?'lost':k==='new'?'new':'';return ''+esc(s||'—')+'';}function render(list){if(!list||!list.length){rows.innerHTML='No contacts yet — add your first one.';return;}rows.innerHTML=list.map(function(c){return ''+esc(c.name)+''+esc(c.company)+''+esc(c.email)+''+badge(c.status)+'';}).join('');}function load(){fetch('/api/data/contacts').then(function(r){return r.ok?r.json():null;}).then(function(d){var list=d&&(d.records||d.items||d.data||(Array.isArray(d)?d:null));if(!list||!list.length){render(SAMPLE);}else{render(list);}}).catch(function(){render(SAMPLE);});}var f=document.getElementById('crm-form');var btn=document.getElementById('crm-submit');var msg=document.getElementById('crm-msg');f.addEventListener('submit',function(e){e.preventDefault();var name=(document.getElementById('crm-name').value||'').trim();var company=(document.getElementById('crm-company').value||'').trim();var email=(document.getElementById('crm-email').value||'').trim();var status=document.getElementById('crm-status').value;msg.className='crm-msg';if(!name||!company||!email||email.indexOf('@')<1){msg.textContent='Please fill in name, company, and a valid email.';msg.className='crm-msg err';return;}btn.disabled=true;var orig=btn.textContent;btn.textContent='Adding…';fetch('/api/data/contacts',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({name:name,company:company,email:email,status:status})}).then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error('bad');return r.json();}).then(function(){f.reset();msg.textContent='Contact added.';msg.className='crm-msg ok';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;load();}).catch(function(){msg.textContent='Something went wrong. Please try again.';msg.className='crm-msg err';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;});});load();})();
